log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:13+-2=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

→ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 7 vs DC 10]
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!

Ogre can't reach Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).

→ Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 8 vs DC 10]
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 16] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 16] HIT! 33 damage. Thri-kreen — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
